services.name: Birth
services.information: Limited number of sliding scale options are available upon request.

services.name: Postpartum and Lactation

packages.title: Lactation Support
includes: Can include breastfeeding education, assistance with latch, establishing plan for return to office, bottle introduction, supply issue, and more

packages.title: Postpartum Support
includes: Can include infant care, infant sleep education, light housework related to baby/mom, and more

services.information: Lactation and Postpartum Support is highly customizable, reach out and we'll prepare the right plan for your needs.

services.name: Prenatal and Postpartum Fitness

packages.title: Prepare, Heal, Strengthen Package
includes: 1 Labor Positioning & Movement Session | 60 min, 36-38 weeks
1 First Movement After Birth | 60min, 2-4 weeks postpartum
1 Core & Pelvic Floor Return to Exercise | 60 min, 6-12 weeks postpartum

packages.title: 1:1 Personal Training Sessions
includes: Individual 60 min training session, either in person or virtually.
Recommended frequency of 2-3x per week to build consistency and results
10% discount if purchasing 5 or more sessions

services.information: 1:1 sessions can be added on the Prepare, Heal, Strengthen Package or a la carte.

seo.title: Doula Services | Sonnet Lamb
seo.description: Sonnet Lamb - New York City based Christian Birth Doula. Here you can find information about the doula services offered by Sonnet Lamb.
